title: Wait A Second [BTW Addon]
description: Stop being disturbed while in your inventory
body:
# Wait A Sec (BTW:CE Addon)
"Hold up a second I need to do something"

*proceed to stop the immutable flow of time\*

This addon allow you to pause the game while you're in an inventory

## Found a bug or have suggestions ?

https://github.com/BTW-Community/Wait-A-Second/issues

## Download: 
https://modrinth.com/mod/wait-a-sec-btw-addon/versions
